---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for OQA System (OSS or Pro)
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is.

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
Other solutions or workarounds.

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or links.

## Would you be interested in the Pro version?
- [ ] Yes (I would like to discuss paid/freelance options)
- [ ] No, just for OSS core
